mission: Statistical core: hierarchical bootstrap, validity, random-partition null (plan §2.10-2.13)

produced_artifacts.library_only: A4 ships pure-math infrastructure; downstream agents (A6, A7, A8) invoke these to write outputs/analysis/{dataset}/meaningful_pairs.parquet and outputs/analysis/{dataset}/null_dist_*.npy in Wave 3+.

deferred.meaningful_pairs.parquet: outputs/analysis/{dataset}/meaningful_pairs.parquet — wired by A6 in Wave 3 once region-level Δ_ij(r) bootstraps land

bootstrap.hierarchical_bootstrap: Two-level resampling: scaffolds (level 1) with replacement, then compounds within each scaffold (level 2). Optional level 3 (seed mixing) when seeds is supplied. Returns BootstrapResult(estimate, ci_lower, ci_upper, samples?).
bootstrap.within_region_bootstrap: Region-restricted variant; resamples scaffolds within the target region only. Used for G_ij(r), Δ_ij(r) CIs in Wave 3.
bootstrap.seed_mixing.draw_seeds: Uniform-with-replacement seed draw across n_iter; verified uniform on test_seed_mixing_uniform.
bootstrap.calibration.run_calibration_check: Implements §2.10 pre-pilot calibration. Three checks: (1) identity statistic CI width < 0.05; (2) mean statistic non-degenerate CI; (3) ≥80% of bootstrap distributions over a panel of 5 statistics pass Shapiro-Wilk normality (alpha=0.01). Raises CalibrationError on failure.
bootstrap.percentile.percentile_ci: Two-sided percentile CI with NaN handling; alpha=0.05 default.

validity.ValidityConfig: Frozen dataclass mirroring configs/_shared/preprocess.yaml: n_min, test_min_clf, test_min_reg, test_min_pos, test_min_neg, ci_width_max, grad_norm_min, epsilon_clf, epsilon_reg, n_min_valid_regions=3.
validity.check_local_support: Five §2.11 conditions; failures recorded in ValidityFlag.failed_reasons under canonical tags REASON_N_TRAIN, REASON_N_TEST, REASON_LABEL_BALANCE, REASON_CI_WIDTH, REASON_GRAD_NORM.
validity.check_meaningful: Four §2.12 conditions; returns (is_meaningful, failed_reasons) under tags COND_VALID_REGIONS, COND_LARGE_DELTA, COND_LABEL_DISTRIBUTION, COND_TEST_SIZE.

null.build_null_distribution: Skeleton loop over n_partitions; A6 supplies compute_statistic in Wave 3. Raises NotImplementedError when compute_statistic is None.
null.empirical_pvalue: (1 + #{b: null[b] >= observed}) / (1 + B); empty null returns 1.0; NaN entries are dropped.

acceptance.all_tests_pass: 32/32 across tests/test_bootstrap.py, tests/test_validity.py, tests/test_null.py (full repo suite: 98/98)
acceptance.bootstrap_matches_clt_within_0_02: iid normal n=1000, seed=42, B=1000: HB CI vs mean ± 1.96·σ/√n delta < 0.02 on each tail (test_bootstrap_matches_normal_clt_approximation)
acceptance.calibration_passes_on_synthetic_fixture: task_1 column of A1 fixture (200 mols, 40 scaffolds) with B=400 — passes identity-width, mean-non-degenerate, and Shapiro-Wilk panel checks
acceptance.B1000_under_30s_single_cpu: iid B=1000 on n=1000: 6.6s; clustered B=1000 on n=400 (80 scaffolds × 5): 0.5s
acceptance.BootstrapResult_json_serializable_exclud: bootstrap_result_to_dict(r, include_samples=False) → json.dumps OK; with include_samples=True samples are flattened to a list

dependencies_observed.A1_contracts: BootstrapResult, ValidityFlag, HierarchicalSamples (utils/types.py); MeaningfulPairSchema (utils/schemas.py); read_parquet/write_parquet, read_npy/write_npy (utils/io.py); configs/_shared/{bootstrap,preprocess}.yaml — all consumed unchanged
dependencies_observed.A1_synthetic_fixture: tests/synthetic_fixture/build.py used by test_calibration_check_passes_on_synthetic via the synthetic_combined fixture

A6_wave3: Wire G_ij(r) bootstrap → check_local_support → write_meaningful_pairs end-to-end
Use within_region_bootstrap on real region indices from A5 partitions
out_of_scope_handed_to.A7_wave3: Run run_calibration_check on real Tox21 G_ii(r) data as part of pilot greenlight
out_of_scope_handed_to.A8_wave4: Use percentile_ci / hierarchical_bootstrap for incremental R² confidence intervals

notes_for_downstream: ValidityConfig defaults read directly from configs/_shared/preprocess.yaml; downstream code that wants different thresholds should construct an explicit ValidityConfig rather than mutating the YAML (locked by configs/_shared/_lock.yaml).

Reason tags (REASON_N_TRAIN, …) and condition tags (COND_VALID_REGIONS, …) are exported from transfermtl.validity for downstream telemetry. Test parametrizations rely on these names, so renames are a coordination-PR change.
hierarchical_bootstrap accepts level1='scaffold'|'cluster' for documentation only; the cluster identity always lives in HierarchicalSamples.scaffold_ids. Latent partitioning passes cluster IDs there.
When seeds is not None but data.seed_ids is None, seed mixing is silently disabled (no error). Callers who require seed mixing should populate seed_ids.
